name: Cincinnati Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat and onions together in a large pot.
2. Drain excess fat, if needed.
3. Stir in vinegar, tomato sauce, stewed tomatoes, milk (with added mace), A-1 sauce, garlic, chili powder, cayenne pepper, sugar, crushed red pepper, cumin, allspice, cinnamon, and bay leaves.
4. Cook slowly for 2-3 hours, adding water as necessary to achieve the desired consistency.
5. Serve over spaghetti.
6. Top with kidney beans and sprinkle chopped onions and grated sharp cheddar cheese on top.
